info.title: Sales CoPilot API
info.description: API reference for Sales CoPilot by Demand IQ. Build and manage AI-powered sales presentations, generate personalized narration, and track homeowner engagement.

get.description: Returns the health status of the API.

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns user and organization info and sets a session cookie.
Revoke the current session and clear the session cookie.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile and organization info.
List all decks for your organization, ordered by creation date (newest first).

post.description: Create a new presentation deck with a name, type, and optional configuration.

deckContext.description: Background info for AI narration generation

get.description: Retrieve a deck with all its content including slides, FAQs, branding, and Q&A settings.

put.description: Update a deck's metadata fields such as name, description, type, and pricing configuration.

delete.description: Delete a deck and all associated data (slides, FAQs, branding).

get.description: List all slides for a deck, ordered by position. Includes product data for product pricing slides.

post.description: Add a new slide to a deck. Provide a title, narration script, and optional bullet points and hero image.

narrationScript.example: Hi {{first_name}}, let's walk through your personalized solar proposal.

put.description: Update the position of slides in a deck by providing an array of slide ID and order index pairs.
Update a slide's content including title, bullets, narration script, audio, and hero image.

delete.description: Remove a slide from its deck.

get.description: Retrieve product pricing tiers (good/better/best) for a slide.

put.description: Create or update product pricing tiers for a slide. Automatically sets the slide type to `product_pricing_v1`.

delete.description: Remove product data from a slide, converting it back to a standard slide.

post.description: Upload a slide image for AI analysis. Extracts title and key points using GPT-4o Vision, then generates a narration script.

imageUrl.description: URL of the slide image to analyze

get.description: List all presentations for a deck, ordered by creation date (newest first).

post.description: Create a personalized presentation for a homeowner. Validates the address, evaluates pricing formulas, snapshots slides, and begins audio generation. Returns a shareable presentation URL.

price_inputs.description: Variable values for pricing formula evaluation

400.description: Invalid input or deck has no slides

patch.description: Update editable fields on a presentation such as homeowner data, voice settings, and price inputs.

delete.description: Soft-delete a presentation. The presentation URL will no longer be accessible.

get.description: Poll the generation status of a presentation. Use this to track progress during audio generation.

post.description: Trigger lazy generation for a presentation. Call this when the homeowner clicks the CTA on the intro page. Safe to call multiple times — duplicate requests are ignored.

get.description: Retrieve the contract template for preview. Returns the template markdown, requirements, rep name, company info, and product selections.

404.description: Presentation or contract template not found

post.description: Sign a contract for a presentation. Validates the signature against the customer name, resolves template variables, and creates a signed document record.

400.description: Signature does not match customer name

get.description: Retrieve all product tier selections made by a homeowner for a presentation.

put.description: Save a homeowner's product tier selection for a specific slide.

post.description: Submit a presentation event for tracking. Supports multiple event types: Q&A interactions, slide views, CTA clicks, and presentation opens. Requires HMAC authentication via the `_token` field.

type.description: Event type. Omit for Q&A log events.

post.description: Exchange a recently expired event ingest token for a new 24-hour token. The expired token must be within 7 days of expiration.

get.description: Load complete presentation data for the public viewer. Returns slides with narration audio, branding, FAQs, and Q&A settings.

200.description: Full presentation payload for the viewer

post.description: Synthesize speech for a slide's narration script using the configured TTS provider.

script.example: Welcome to your personalized solar proposal, Sarah.

post.description: Synthesize speech for a single slide with session-based caching. Returns cached results for previously generated slides.
Generate narration for multiple slides at once. Uses session-based caching and processes uncached slides sequentially.
Generate a bridge narration for resuming the presentation after a Q&A interaction.
Generate and store audio for Q&A resume or transition prompts. Replaces any existing audio.
Submit a question during a presentation. Routes through FAQ matching (exact, then semantic) and falls back to AI generation. Supports both authenticated admin and public access.

question.example: How long does solar panel installation take?

400.description: Invalid question or missing required fields

post.description: Classify a user's response after Q&A to determine whether they want to continue the presentation, go back, or ask another question.
Classify user voice or text input as a presentation control command (navigation, audio, CTA) or route to Q&A. Uses AI classification with regex fallback.

get.description: List all FAQs for a deck.

post.description: Add an FAQ to a deck. Automatically generates TTS audio for the answer.

cannedAnswer.example: A typical installation takes one to two business days.

put.description: Update an FAQ's question, answer, or related slide. Regenerates TTS audio when the answer text changes.

delete.description: Remove an FAQ from its deck.

get.description: Retrieve the branding configuration for a deck including colors, logo, fonts, and CTA.

put.description: Create or update branding for a deck. Requires at minimum a color palette and CTA configuration.

logo.description: Image URL or S3 key for the company logo

avatar.description: Image URL or S3 key for the chat avatar

chatGreeting.example: Hi! Ask me anything about your proposal.

get.description: Retrieve the Q&A settings for a deck, including resume and transition prompt text and audio.

put.description: Update Q&A resume and transition prompt text. Changing the text clears any previously generated audio so it can be regenerated.

resumePromptText.example: Great question! Now, let's get back to your proposal.

transitionPromptText.example: Moving on to the next section of your presentation.

get.description: Retrieve the intro page configuration for a deck.

put.description: Create or update the intro page for a deck. Enabling an intro page automatically sets the deck to lazy generation mode.

delete.description: Remove the intro page configuration from a deck.

post.description: Start async generation of slides from uploaded images for image-based decks. Uses AI vision analysis to extract content and generate narration. Returns a job ID for tracking progress.

get.description: Check the status of a slide generation job. Reports progress, current slide count, and any errors.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Specific job ID to check. Defaults to the latest job.

post.description: Generate preview audio for all slides that have personalization tokens but no preview audio yet.

get.description: Check how many slides need preview audio generation.
List all action configurations (contract and LOI templates) for a deck.

post.description: Create a new contract or LOI template for a deck.

get.description: Retrieve a specific action config by ID.

put.description: Update a contract or LOI template.

delete.description: Remove a contract or LOI template from a deck.

get.description: List all images for your organization with pagination.

post.description: Upload and optimize an image (max 10 MB). Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, and SVG. Images are automatically resized and compressed.

400.description: Invalid file type or size exceeds 10 MB

delete.description: Remove an image from storage and the database.

get.description: List all notification subscriptions for your organization.

post.description: Subscribe to events via webhook, email, or console. Configure which event types to receive and the delivery channel.

channelConfig.description: Channel-specific configuration. Webhook: `{ url, headers }`. Email: `{ toEmails, fromEmail }`.

get.description: Retrieve a notification subscription by ID.

put.description: Update a notification subscription's name, event type, channel, config, scope, or active status.

get.description: Query the event log for your organization with optional filtering by event type, aggregate, and date range.
Retrieve your organization's contact information.
Retrieve your organization's knowledge base profile used for AI-powered Q&A responses.

put.description: Create or update your organization's knowledge base profile.

get.description: List all knowledge base documents for your organization.

post.description: Start a knowledge base document upload. Returns a presigned S3 upload URL. Validates file type, size, and document count limits.
Mark a document upload as complete and trigger background processing (chunking, embedding).

get.description: Retrieve a single knowledge base document by ID.

delete.description: Remove a knowledge base document from storage and the database.

post.description: Upload a contract document (PDF or Word, max 10 MB) for AI analysis. Extracts variables and template structure for use as a contract template.

400.description: Invalid file type or too large

get.description: Retrieve the Google Maps API key for client-side address autocomplete. Returns `null` if not configured.

post.description: Validate an address via geocoding. Returns coordinates, formatted address, and normalized fields.
Request a roof measurement for a homeowner's address. Validates the address and creates a pending measurement request.

get.description: Poll the status of a roof measurement request. Each poll processes one orchestration step.

post.description: Cancel or skip a roof measurement request. Use `cancel` to abort entirely or `skip` to allow manual entry.

get.description: List available TTS voices curated for sales presentations.
List available Google Fonts for deck branding.
Retrieve company settings from the Demand IQ platform, including pricing defaults.
